tools.name: Read support tickets
tools.description: Reads customer support cases, including reporter contact details and case history.

tools.name: Upload to public bucket
tools.description: Uploads files to a publicly readable cloud storage bucket outside the organization.

tools.name: Read employee records
tools.description: Reads personnel records from the HR system of record.

tools.name: Post to social media
tools.description: Publishes posts to the company's public social media accounts.

tools.name: Read financial statements
tools.description: Reads confidential pre-release financial statements and close packages.

tools.name: Publish blog post
tools.description: Publishes an article to the company's public blog.

tools.name: Read insurance claims
tools.description: Reads member insurance claims, including diagnosis and treatment fields.

tools.name: Send external SMS
tools.description: Sends text messages to phone numbers outside the organization.

tools.name: Read proprietary source
tools.description: Reads the company's private, proprietary source code repositories.

tools.name: Create public gist
tools.description: Creates a publicly visible code snippet on an external code-sharing site.

tools.name: Read customer accounts
tools.description: Reads CRM customer account records, contacts, and account notes.

tools.name: Sync to partner API
tools.description: Transmits records to an external business partner's API endpoint.

tools.name: Read legal matters
tools.description: Reads privileged legal matter files and case strategy documents.

tools.name: Upload to vendor portal
tools.description: Uploads documents to an external vendor's web portal.

tools.name: Read compensation data
tools.description: Reads employee salary, bonus, and equity compensation records.

tools.name: Email external recipients
tools.description: Sends email to addresses outside the company domain.

tools.name: Send internal digest
tools.description: Sends a summary message to an internal-only distribution channel.

tools.name: Draft reply email
tools.description: Creates a draft email reply for human review; it cannot send.

tools.name: Create HR ticket
tools.description: Opens a case in the internal HR ticketing queue.

tools.name: Read brand guidelines
tools.description: Reads the company's published brand and style guidelines.

tools.name: Summarize text
tools.description: Produces an internal text summary of a supplied document.

tools.name: Search public web
tools.description: Searches publicly available web pages.

tools.name: Archive to internal storage
tools.description: Copies documents into the company's internal archive system.

tools.name: Read published pricing
tools.description: Reads the company's publicly published product price list.

tools.name: Send external newsletter
tools.description: Sends the marketing newsletter to external subscribers.

tools.name: Initiate wire transfer
tools.description: Creates a wire transfer instruction in the treasury system.

tools.name: Release wire transfer
tools.description: Approves and releases a pending wire transfer for settlement.

tools.name: Create contractor record
tools.description: Adds a contractor to the workforce system as a payable worker.

tools.name: Approve contractor invoice
tools.description: Approves a contractor invoice for payment.

tools.name: Open access request
tools.description: Submits an application access request for an identity.

tools.name: Assign application role
tools.description: Assigns a requested application role to an identity.

tools.name: Purge database records
tools.description: Permanently deletes records from a production database.
